description: You can use the services in the GraphQL folder to add data loading capability to the GraphQL resolver service in Integration Server.

services.name: pub.graphql:load
description: WmPublic. Loads the data for a single key and returns the values.

input_parameters.name: $internal
description: Important: This parameter is reserved for internal use by Integration Server. Do not modify or delete the value of this parameter.

input_parameters.name: key
description: Contains the field(s) for which you want to fetch the data from the data source. The field(s) in this document must be same as the field(s) in the key document of Dataloader service input signature. For more information on Dataloader service, see IBM webMethods Service Development Help .

input_parameters.name: loaderName
description: Specifies the name of the Dataloader.

output_parameters.name: $internal
description: Document containing the fields, which are used internally by Dataloader.

services.name: pub.graphql:loadMany
description: WmPublic. Loads the data for a multiple keys and returns the list of values.

input_parameters.name: $internal
description: Important: This parameter is reserved for internal use by Integration Server. Do not modify or delete the value of this parameter.

input_parameters.name: keys
description: Contains the field(s) for which you want to fetch the data from the data source. The field(s) in this document must be same as the field(s) in the key document of Dataloader service input signature. For more information on Dataloader service, see IBM webMethods Service Development Help

input_parameters.name: loaderName
description: Specifies the name of the Dataloader.

output_parameters.name: $internal
description: Document containing the fields, which are used internally by Dataloader.

usage_notes: You can only invoke the pub.graphql:load and pub.graphql:loadMany services from a data resolver service and always as a last step.
From a data resolver service, you can invoke the pub.graphql:load and pub.graphql:loadMany services only once.

You can either use a Dataloader or a resolver service to load data. If you are using a Dataloader to load data for a field, then you cannot use the resolver service to load data for the same field. Resolver service should be used only to identify and map the key(s) to pub.graphql:load or pub.graphql:loadMany service.
